activities.title: Locate and Inventory Binary Artifacts
activities.description: Find official binary at ~/.local/share/claude/versions/LATEST, determine version, identify embedded JavaScript bundle boundaries, catalog string table regions.

activities.title: Extract Protocol Constants
activities.description: Use strings/objdump to extract all protocol-relevant constants: version strings, OAuth client IDs, issuer URLs, beta flags, attribution salt, system prompt variants, header names, scope lists.

activities.title: Reconstruct Attribution Hash Algorithm
activities.description: Identify the TG$ function and its callers. Trace how the hash parameter H is computed. Determine whether salt-based or version-appended. Verify cch=00000 is hardcoded. Document cc_workload source (iP$ function).

activities.title: Map OAuth Handshake Sequence
activities.description: Extract complete OAuth endpoint URLs, PKCE parameters, scope lists (authorize vs refresh), redirect URI, code exchange body format, profile fetch endpoint. Produce handshake chart.

activities.title: Document Packet Composition Format
activities.description: Reconstruct the exact HTTP request structure: header ordering, header values, URL format, body transform rules (mcp_ prefix, system prompt injection, empty block filtering). Produce packet composition diagram.

activities.title: Extract SSE Response Event Schema
activities.description: Identify all SSE event types handled (message_start through message_stop, ping, error), their JSON data structure, content block types (text, tool_use, thinking), usage fields, and mcp_ stripping rules.

activities.title: Generate Test Vectors
activities.description: Construct known-input test cases. For each test case, record the expected wire-format HTTP request (headers + body + URL). Include edge cases: empty system prompt, no tools, multiple tool_use blocks, expired token.
